name: DSCC Deadline Alert
subject: last chance to stick it (literally) to Trump with 4X impact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Our end-of-month deadline is 1 hour away and we're still $9,362 shy from reaching our goal. Chip in a TRIPLE-MATCHED gift before midnight and get a free sticker!

name: Tom Perez
subject: A big victory for Democrats:
body:
Republicans want to repeal protections for pre-existing conditions.
---
**Add your name: tell Congress to stop trying to take away our health care.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Pre-Existing-Conditions1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170501_tp_nd&source=em_20170501_tp_nd")**
You've got the GOP on the ropes.

Late last night, Democratic leaders reached a deal to stop a Republican-led government shutdown, and it's a major victory for all of us who are resisting the Trump agenda:

* Democrats prevented Republicans from blocking funding for Planned Parenthood.
* Protected important programs from severe cuts proposed by Donald Trump.
* Not one red cent for Donald's border wall.

That's huge. And it only happened because you made sure Republicans knew there'd be hell to pay for backing Donald Trump's agenda.

But chalking up one big win doesn't mean Republicans are giving up. In fact, Donald Trump's chief of staff and chief economist have said that the GOP has the votes in the House to pass Trumpcare. That would put Donald Trump one step closer to signing away the ACA's protections for people with pre-existing condtions. Millions of Americans health care -- and lives -- are on the line.

**We chalked up a big win yesterday, and that's great. But we can't afford to rest on our laurels. Take action now: call on Republicans to stop their crusade to take our health care away:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Pre-Existing-Conditions1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170501_tp_nd&source=em_20170501_tp_nd")**
The resistance has been made possible because you stepped up. Keep doing what you're doing, and I see a lot more victories in our future together.

Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf1b/4067b0a/2f0b3a727/7e74e2ea/2628850346/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170501_tp_nd&source=em_20170501_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf1b/4067b0a/2f0b3a727/7e74e2eb/2628850346/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170501_tp_nd&source=em_20170501_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf1b/4067b0a/2f0b3a727/7e74e2e8/2628850346/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170501_tp_nd&source=em_20170501_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf1b/4067b0a/2f0b3a727/7e74e2e9/2628850346/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170501_tp_nd&source=em_20170501_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Team, we need to recommit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd48/2a380d31/15624870/fef775/829881769/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd48/2a380d31/15624870/fef775/829881769/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
Over the last few months, we've seen that unfortunately the anti-woman, xenophobic agenda that fueled Trump's campaign has also defined his top priorities in the Oval Office.
His dangerous plans to repeal the Affordable Care Act would leave millions without access to basic, affordable health care.
His denial around climate change jeopardizes the future of our planet.
His un-American travel ban is an affront to our Constitution and the principles on which our country was founded.
**We can't get complacent, team -- we have to double down and resist.**
**We can take a stand against the Trump administration's extreme agenda -- but only if each and every one of us recommits to the fight. [Will you add your name right now to fight back against any dangerous proposal that Donald Trump puts forward?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd48/2a380d31/15624870/fef776/829881769/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/trump100days/?code=maggie&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2F100daysja&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
Thanks for being in this,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd48/2a380d31/15624870/fef777/829881769/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMTAwZGF5c2phIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzA1MDFfMTAwZGF5c2phX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/100daysja?refcode=e20170501_100daysja_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd48/2a380d31/15624870/fef770/829881769/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

His dangerous plans to repeal the Affordable Care Act would leave millions without access to basic, affordable health care. His denial around climate change jeopardizes the future of our planet. His un-American travel ban is an affront to our Constitution and the principles on which our country was founded. We can't get complacent, team -- we have to double down and resist. name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: New Trumpcare, even worse for women >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7fa3/24c69fd9/ede261bf/18e5d45c/1025063507/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE502N_digital_email_20170501_Trumpcare_inact&source=WQEFE502N_digital_email_20170501_Trumpcare_inact")
---

Peter,

In a desperate attempt to give President Trump a victory, congressional Republicans have resurrected their plan to repeal Obamacare.

That's right: It's back. With a vengeance.

And to try to shove this deeply unpopular bill over the finish line, what is Paul Ryan doing? Attacking women's health care. The latest version of their plan would allow states to deny women essential health benefits like birth control, maternity care, and breast cancer screenings.

**[Trumpcare was defeated last time because of a wave of grassroots opposition to the bill and our women in Congress standing united against it. Donate $3 to help defeat it again and send a message that women's health care is not up for debate.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7fa3/24c69fd9/ede261bf/18e5d45d/1025063507/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170501_email_Trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Trumpcare+was+defeated+last+time+because&utm_campaign=WQEFE502N_digital_email_20170501_Trumpcare_inact&source=WQEFE502N_digital_email_20170501_Trumpcare_inact")**

Under the GOP's plan, insurers could charge people with pre-existing conditions far more for their insurance. We could be taken back to a pre-Obamacare era, when pregnancy and even being a woman could be considered a pre-existing condition.

The attacks on women's health care don't stop there. The bill would also defund Planned Parenthood and further restrict coverage of abortion in the private insurance market.

At times like these, American women need defenders in their corner. That's why our women in Congress thwarted recent attempts to pass Trumpcare and why they'll keep fighting it every time until Republicans back down.

**Donate $3 to support the women in Congress who will protect our health care and help grow their ranks:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Stop-Trumpcare](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7fa3/24c69fd9/ede261bf/18e5d45e/1025063507/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170501_email_Trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgStopTrumpcare&utm_campaign=WQEFE502N_digital_email_20170501_Trumpcare_inact&source=WQEFE502N_digital_email_20170501_Trumpcare_inact")**

Thanks,

Kate Black
Chief of Staff, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7fa3/24c69fd9/ede261bf/18e5d45f/1025063507/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170501_email_Trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE502N_digital_email_20170501_Trumpcare_inact&source=WQEFE502N_digital_email_20170501_Trumpcare_inact")

|

clean_body: We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | "" Peter, In a desperate attempt to give President Trump a victory, congressional Republicans have resurrected their plan to repeal Obamacare. That's right: It's back. With a vengeance. And to try to shove this deeply unpopular bill over the finish line, what is Paul Ryan doing? Attacking women's health care. The latest version of their plan would allow states to deny women essential health benefits like birth control, maternity care, and breast cancer screenings. "" Under the GOP's plan, insurers could charge people with pre-existing conditions far more for their insurance. We could be taken back to a pre-Obamacare era, when pregnancy and even being a woman could be considered a pre-existing condition. The attacks on women's health care don't stop there. The bill would also defund Planned Parenthood and further restrict coverage of abortion in the private insurance market. At times like these, American women need defenders in their corner. That's why our women in Congress thwarted recent attempts to pass Trumpcare and why they'll keep fighting it every time until Republicans back down. Donate $3 to support the women in Congress who will protect our health care and help grow their ranks: "" Thanks, Kate Black Chief of Staff, EMILY's List "" | EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List "" and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email "". We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe "". Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Team DSCC
subject: We want to say thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Democratic senators spent the first 100 days tirelessly fighting to protect Americans against Trump's policies. Thanks for standing with them.
---

**A quick note on contributions, friend:**

Senate Democrats are the first line of defense against all of Trump's reckless proposals. We're hard at work readying resources for the fights ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, we mean it when we say we're counting on you.

Please consider making a contribution of any amount today.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170501-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e0f7/2b07114c/5d5d25c6/736d6b25/2754796244/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e0f7/2b07114c/5d5d25c6/736d6b24/2754796244/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e0f7/2b07114c/5d5d25c6/736d6b27/2754796244/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
